visual_match.title: Computer Wisdom
visual_match.status_line: Recovered archive. Receipt-backed navigation. Evidence first.
visual_match.operating_rule_visible: No deletion. No rename. No movement without receipt-backed review.

limitations: This audit confirms visible portal-to-repo consistency and linked proof surfaces.
It does not independently verify every linked receipt file.
It does not claim new onchain proof or mutate portal.html.
canon_line: The portal points to proof surfaces. The proof still lives in receipts, topology, replay, and witness records.
